issues: Insufficient subject line
Incomplete email body
Lack of personalization
No value proposition
No call to action
data.revision_instructions: Score below 70 -- full re-run required, not revision. Revise the sales outreach email to include a compelling subject line that captures attention. The body should start with a personalized greeting, followed by a clear value proposition that addresses the client's needs. Include a call to action that encourages the recipient to respond or engage further. Ensure the tone is professional and matches the client's brand voice.
systemic_flags: Agent sales_outreach pass rate critically low: 0%
escalations: ESCALATE to Production Manager: sales_outreach suspension recommended
